chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2537 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability of petition. 13.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Altaf, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Altaf Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General. This petition is pending since 2023 with objections as to maintainability, however, the learned counsel could not address the same. The matter pertains the levy of taxes by the cantonments and counsel was queried as to how any objection subsisted post amendment of the Constitution vide the 26th Amendment. Once again learned counsel remained unable to assist. Therefore, no case is made out to perpetuate this petition, hence, the same is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
